name: Trap Banger
description: Hard-hitting trap with quick hook, heavy drops, YouTube-optimized pacing. First drop at ~30s, energy peaks every 16-20 bars.

sections.name: intro
sections.label: Intro
sections.description: Hook melody tease — grab attention in first 5 seconds

sections.name: verse_1
sections.label: Verse 1
sections.description: Main groove establishes — drums, bass, melody

sections.name: drop_1
sections.label: Drop 1
sections.description: Full energy drop — all elements, hits hard at ~30 seconds

sections.name: verse_2
sections.label: Verse 2
sections.description: Second verse with slight variation — keep it moving

sections.name: drop_2
sections.label: Drop 2
sections.description: Second drop — bigger or different from first

sections.name: bridge
sections.label: Bridge
sections.description: Energy dip — melody only, builds tension for final drop

sections.name: drop_3
sections.label: Final Drop
sections.description: Last energy peak — longest drop for maximum impact

sections.name: outro
sections.label: Outro
sections.description: Gradual fadeout — melody only, clean ending
